name: mindspore-skills
description: MindSpore operator development and model migration skills

skills.name: api-helper
skills.description: Find API call chains and operator wiring in MindSpore codebase

skills.name: cpu-plugin-builder
skills.description: Build CPU operators via ATen/libtorch adaptation

skills.name: cpu-native-builder
skills.description: Build native CPU kernels with Eigen/SLEEF

skills.name: npu-builder
skills.description: Build NPU operators for Huawei Ascend

skills.name: mindspore-aclnn-operator-devflow
skills.description: End-to-end ACLNN operator adaptation workflow for MindSpore Ascend

skills.name: hf-diffusers-migrate
skills.description: Migrate HF diffusers models to mindone.diffusers

skills.name: hf-transformers-migrate
skills.description: Migrate Hugging Face transformers models to mindone.transformers

skills.name: hf-transformers-migrate-test

skills.name: setup-agent
skills.description: Validate and prepare execution environment for training or remote execution

skills.name: failure-agent
skills.description: Diagnose crashes, runtime errors, hangs, and communication failures

skills.name: accuracy-agent
skills.description: Diagnose accuracy regression, numerical drift, and wrong-result issues

skills.name: performance-agent
skills.description: Diagnose throughput, latency, and memory bottlenecks

skills.name: op-agent
skills.description: Drive missing-operator analysis and route to the right implementation workflow

skills.name: algorithm-agent
skills.description: Recommend and apply algorithm-level techniques for quality or convergence improvement
